creator: florian.millet@corp.ovh.com
text:
Created attachment 201241
svn diff from directory /usr/ports/sysutils/sas3ircu

Hello everyone,

Here is a patch to update sas3ircu to version 17.00.00.00 which is the latest.
Only minor tweaks were necessary as they changed the layout of the zip file.
I also changed the URL where to download the file as it is Broadcom which sells LSI cards now.

Tested on FreeBSD/amd64 11.1, 11.2 and 12.0

(Proposed patch is svn diff from directory /usr/ports/sysutils/sas3ircu)
